entry.name: Tegile_IntelliFlash_ProjectLUNs_API
entry.description: Monitors Tegile project LUN performance metrics such as IOPS, data throughput, latency & storage.

attribute.name: scriptgroovy

datapoint.name: readonly
datapoint.description:
Specifies whether it is read only. Supported values are on and off.
on - 1 off - 0

datapoint.name: reservationInByte
datapoint.description: Enables reservation on the dataset. The value should be greater than 1 MB (1048576 bytes) or set to 0 (no limit).

datapoint.name: accessState
datapoint.description:
An integer indicating whether the LUN is:
- active (0) - active to standby (1) - standby (2) - standby to active (3)

datapoint.name: operationalStatus
datapoint.description:
Operational status of the LUN:
- Stmf (SCSI target mode framework) logical unit offline (0) - Stmf logical unit offlining (1) - Stmf logical unit online (2) - Stmf logical unit onlining (3) - Stmf logical unit unregistered (4)

datapoint.name: Average_Latency
datapoint.description: Average latency, in millisecond, for read/write operations.

datapoint.name: Total_MBps
datapoint.description: Total Read/Write throughput data, in megabytes/sec.

datapoint.name: Total_Bytes
datapoint.description: Total Read/Write throughput data, in bytes/sec.

datapoint.name: Utilization
datapoint.alertbody:
Project LUN ##INSTANCE## on Tegile Array ##HOST## has reported that ##VALUE## % of its storage capacity is now utilized, placing the LUN into ##LEVEL## state.
This started at ##START##, -- or ##DURATION## ago.

datapoint.name: FreeSize
datapoint.description: Amount of size free in the LUN (bytes)
